mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_IMG (img_no, b_no, img_name) VALUES (IMG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{b_no}, #{fileName})

SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD (b_no, b_title, b_content, b_writer, b_date) VALUES (#{b_no}, #{b_title}, #{b_content}, #{b_writer}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT img_name FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE b_no = #{b_no}
SELECT b.*, (SELECT img_name FROM (SELECT img_name FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE b_no = b.b_no ORDER BY img_no ASC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbImg FROM BOARD b ORDER BY b_no DESC
